sentences.arabic: سَمِعَتْ دَلَالٌ صَوْتَ طَرْقٍ تَحْتَ الطَّاوِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dalal je čula zvuk kucanja ispod stola.
sentences.translationEn: Dalal heard a knocking sound under the table.
She looked under the table with fear.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتْ كَلْبًا صَغِيرًا يَرْتَجِفُ مِنَ الْبَرْدِ.
sentences.translation: Pronašla je malog psa koji drhti od hladnoće.
sentences.translationEn: She found a small dog shivering from the cold.

sentences.translation: Donijela mu je deku i hrane.
sentences.translationEn: She brought it a blanket and food.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتْ أَهْلَ الْحَيِّ عَنِ الْكَلْبِ حَتَّى وَجَدَتْ صَاحِبَهُ.
sentences.translation: Pitala je komšije o psu dok nije pronašla njegovog vlasnika.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the neighbours about the dog until she found its owner.
